title: Origins: Celestial
description: To the stars who listen and the dreams that are answered.
body:
For this to work, you need the Origins Mod.
You can choose a different character to become your origin to experience Minecraft.

This Origin is Coded in newest version of origin, so for lower versions or forge version, there may having bugs that not expected.

# Celestial
### **To the stars who listen and the dreams that are answered.**

## Core System
- ![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e1e2ceed75fbc6ff4179cba480f3aaa41252fc83.png)Mystery power
  - You have a mana system, but you can only restore it by using (Primary Active) when holding [Amethyst Shard/ Block] or standing still for a while. You will increase your maximum mana from four to seven by having a [Nether Star] in your inventory.

- ![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/86aaf49cd6c83de68631fb295bf74c36dc6a5e23.png)Mystery Source
  - You can craft [Budding Amethyst] with four [Amethyst Block],  You will gain {Speed} and {Regeneration} when restoreing extra mana, level will scale with the extra mana you gain from restoreing it. You no longer natural regen, but you never starve.

## Core Survival Power

- ![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f31e7815e0564866d9227e0e4e4b27391e66148c.png)Fire Proof
  - You receive Fire resistance

- Arise
  - If you put [Nether Star] in your off hand, you can flight for 0.5 seconds. Cost 1 mana. You also no Fall Damage when having at least 1 mana.

## Core Fighting Power

- ![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/13deade28ac9409aee649a8b8d7f799f9378d2d7.png)Meteor Help
  - Using (Secondary Active), you can charge a large Meteor from the sky and throw at where you looking at. Charge longer to consume more mana, and create a larger Meteor. When use without charging, you will create a Meteor rain from the sky. Player with [Budding Amethyst] won't take any damage, instead recieve {Speed}.
